title: Airstrike attack on residential area
description: During a meeting with President Guy Parmelain after his arrival in Geneva, he thanked Switzerland for all the support provided and, in particular, for its willingness to help bring peace closer. Informed Mr. President about constant Russian attacks and our needs to strengthen air defense. He spoke about the situation at the front and Ukrainian long-range sanctions. Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...
description_en: During a meeting with President Guy Parmelain after his arrival in Geneva, he thanked Switzerland for all the support provided and, in particular, for its willingness to help bring peace closer. Informed Mr. President about constant Russian attacks and our needs to strengthen air defense. He spoke about the situation at the front and Ukrainian long-range sanctions. Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...
description_uk: Під час зустрічі з Президентом Гі Пармеленом після прибуття в Женеву подякував Швейцарії за всю надану підтримку і, зокрема, за готовність допомагати в наближенні миру. Поінформував пана Президента про постійні російські атаки й наші потреби для посилення ППО. Розповів про ситуацію на фронті та українські далекобійні санкції. Наші мідлстрайки та дипстрайки цілком справедливо змушують Росію...

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: As Patriot missiles run low, Ukraine scrambles for alternatives under Russian missile fire Russia fired 34 ballistic missiles at Ukraine during the June 15 overnight attack that set part of Kyiv’s historic Pechersk Lavra compound aflame. Kyiv’s Patriot batteries shot down 15 of the 19 ballistic missiles fired at the capital, along with five out of six 3M22 “Zirkon” hypersonic cruise missiles,...

title: Evacuation ordered
description: Guinea pigs in the Kharkiv biolaboratory and zoo have now become Russia's enemies. As a result of the attack, several animals died, the State Emergency Service reports. After the flight, one of the enclosures caught fire. The fire was quickly extinguished, and the rest of the animals were evacuated. Oh, and sick bastards.
description_en: Guinea pigs in the Kharkiv biolaboratory and zoo have now become Russia's enemies. As a result of the attack, several animals died, the State Emergency Service reports. After the flight, one of the enclosures caught fire. The fire was quickly extinguished, and the rest of the animals were evacuated. Oh, and sick bastards.
description_uk: Теперь врагами россии стали морские свинки в харьковской биолаборатории зоопарке В результате удара несколько животных погибли, сообщает ГСЧС. После прилета загорелся один из вольеров. Пожар удалось быстро потушить, а остальных животных эвакуировали. Ох, и больные же ублюдки.

title: Kharkiv: 6 injured
description: 'Missile struck those who save lives' — 4 rescuers killed, 6 injured in Russian double-tap strike on Kharkiv. Kharkiv City Emergency Department Director Bohdan Hladkykh told Suspilne that one of the missiles struck approximately 30 meters from rescuers who had left the grounds of a civilian enterprise hit in the attack and were standing in a forest belt.
description_en: 'Missile struck those who save lives' — 4 rescuers killed, 6 injured in Russian double-tap strike on Kharkiv. description: 👨‍🚒 Moscow kills those who save lives 🕯️We bow our heads in sorrow for the rescuers of the State Emergency Service who died in Kharkiv while saving lives. They arrived at the site of the enemy attack to help the victims, but Moscow cynically struck again just as the emergency services were working. 🫡 Eternal memory and honor to the Heroes who, until their last breath, remained faithful to their duty and saved others...

title: Strike confirmed
description: Representatives of UNESCO and the UN are already working at the site of the impact on the laurel, recording the damage. The fire did not reach the interior of the Assumption Cathedral, but there was smoke. There are two holes in the vault and the smell of burnt wood. Water on the floor - from suffocation. According to the general director of the reserve "Kyiv-Pecherska Lavra" Maksym...
description_en: Representatives of UNESCO and the UN are already working at the site of the impact on the laurel, recording the damage. The fire did not reach the interior of the Assumption Cathedral, but there was smoke. There are two holes in the vault and the smell of burnt wood. Water on the floor - from suffocation. According to the general director of the reserve "Kyiv-Pecherska Lavra" Maksym...
description_uk: На месте ударов в лавре уже работают представители ЮНЕСКО и ООН, фиксируя повреждения. Огонь внутрь Успенского собора не попал, но было задымление Корреспондент УНИАН Дмитрий Хилюк сообщает, что видимых повреждений иконостаса в Успенском соборе нет. Есть две дыры в своде и запах горелого дерева. Вода на полу - от тушения. По словам, гендиректора заповедника "Киево-Печерская лавра" Максима...
